notes: Nanobana imggen + Magnific upscale + Kling video
Nanobana imggen + Magnific upscale + Luma video
Nanobana imggen + Magnific upscale + Wan 2.7 video
Flux 2 Pro imggen only — no video generated yet
Depth map as source. Flux 2 Pro base imggen + NB edit + Magnific upscale. Luma Modify video (P006).
Depth map as source. Flux 2 Pro base imggen + NB edit + Magnific upscale. Wan 2.7 video (P006).
Depth map as source. Flux 2 Pro base imggen (P003 + Riyadh reference). NB edit (P004/P005) to fix tower placement. Magnific upscale. Kling o1 video (P006). Max video length discovered: 10s.

Chunked Kling o1 V2V via ComfyUI — first seam-clean run. 2x 3s chunks with 24-frame crossfade = 6s final. Seam fixes: chunk1-tail -> chunk2 reference_images[0] (SetNode/GetNode teleport), restyle as reference_images[1], kjnodes ColorMatch (mkl) chunk2 -> chunk1, 'HARD FIRST FRAME' prompt anchor on chunk 2, seed=42 both chunks. Tests open question #1 on Classic fork (seam visibility). KLC = Kling Chunked. Raw MP4 not yet archived to scenes/ tree.

Z-Image Base img2img on unlit render. 25 test outputs. Model rejected — painterly output, poor composition preservation, blank rooms at high denoise. Correct settings: lumina2 CLIP, euler/beta, 30 steps, CFG 4, denoise 0.6. Initially misconfigured with qwen_image CLIP (garbled outputs) and wrong sampler for Turbo variant.

Z-Image Turbo img2img on unlit render. Same source as ZI test. Model rejected — same quality issues as Base variant. Correct settings: lumina2 CLIP, res_multistep/simple, 8 steps, CFG 1.0. Found by cross-referencing official Comfy-Org template.

Flux Dev FP8 img2img on unlit render. Better than Z-Image but not matching Nano Banana Pro quality. DualCLIPLoader (clip_l + t5xxl_fp8), euler/simple, 20 steps, CFG 1.0. FP8 variant cannot load LoRAs (buffer size mismatch). Pivoted to full bf16 + Depth ControlNet approach.

Z-Image Turbo MickMumpitz professional workflow — txt2img variant (empty latent, denoise=1.0). Correct nodes: QwenImageDiffsynthControlnet, ModelPatchLoader with Z-Image-Turbo-Fun-Controlnet-Union-2.1-2601-8steps.safetensors (6.3GB), ModelSamplingAuraFlow shift=3, res_2s sampler (RES4LYF), KSampler steps=9 cfg=1 simple denoise=1.0. Better than original Z-Image test (F-LC-002) but still inconsistent on unlit renders. Model cannot reliably convert grey mesh to photorealistic output. F-LC-004.

Z-Image Turbo MickMumpitz — triple ControlNet variant (depth 0.5 + canny 0.3 + source 0.75). Dark/grungy results. ControlNet signals appear to fight each other. Quality degraded vs txt2img variant. F-LC-004.

Z-Image Turbo MickMumpitz — img2img on LIT render (source as latent, denoise=0.6, depth CN + source CN). Best Z-Image result overall but only on the lit render (LT pass), which already has lighting/materials from Unreal — model is enhancing, not generating. On UT (unlit) renders, still poor. Pass=LT because this used the lit render, not the untextured grey. Decision: Z-Image line of investigation closed. F-LC-004.

pipeline: Source video -> Resize(1280x720) -> Nano Banana(Gemini 3 Pro) -> Upscale(4x-UltraSharp) -> LTX 2.3 22B FP8 V2V (IC-LoRA HDR 1.0 + Distilled LoRA 0.5) -> HDR Postprocess -> MP4

signal_path.model_chain: Checkpoint(FP8) -> Distilled LoRA(0.5) -> HDR IC-LoRA(1.0) -> CFG Guider
signal_path.v2v: Source -> Resize -> VAEEncode -> IC-LoRA guide latent
signal_path.style: Frame 0 -> Nano Banana -> Upscale -> IC-LoRA guide image
signal_path.sampling: IC-LoRA -> CFGGuider(pos/neg) + Sampler(latent) direct, Sampler -> CropGuides -> output

observations.motion: Good — source video motion preserved well
observations.style: Faded — Nano Banana style insufficient. Fades more over time. Cause: only 5 sigma steps starting at 0.975 (low denoise strength).
observations.milestone: FIRST SUCCESSFUL V2V OUTPUT — Local fork end-to-end pipeline confirmed working

next_iteration.expected_effect: Stronger style transfer, less fading over time

session_notes: 8-hour troubleshooting marathon. Blockers resolved: (1) volume torch shadowing system CUDA, (2) hot-swap SSE not broadcasting, (3) corrupted workflow JSON (last_link_id mismatch causing link ID collisions), (4) duplicate node IDs, (5) KJNodes GetNode wildcard auto-connect issues. V5 workflow built clean from CJ's working base with integrity checks.

observations.motion: Perfect — pixel-identical to source. Proved low sigmas lock motion completely
observations.style: None — almost no visible style transfer at this sigma range

notes: Key finding: low sigmas (0.4 start) lock motion perfectly but eliminate style. Establishes that motion and style are separate controls (F-LC-007).

observations.style: ~60% — first frame strong, fades after first second then holds. Confirmed style fade is IC-LoRA single-reference limitation (F-LC-008)

notes: Binary search jump from 0.4 to 0.9. Discovered style fade over time — fundamental IC-LoRA limitation, not sigma-related.

observations.style: Best result — stronger than v14. Still fades when camera moves away from start frame. Chunked V2V needed (F-LC-009)

notes: Current optimum. Binary search split from 0.9 to 0.95. Best balance of motion fidelity and style transfer for single-reference V2V.
